message:
feat(cli): complete security scanning and finalize implementations

Complete remaining implementations for security scanning and finalize
various command implementations.

src/cli/commands/security.rs:
- ACIP scanning integration for skill content
- Batch scanning for skill directories
- Report generation with severity levels
- Quarantine management for flagged content

src/cli/commands/edit.rs:
- Additional editing workflow refinements

src/storage/sqlite.rs:
- Final query helper implementations

These changes complete the security integration, enabling proactive
scanning of skill content for potential prompt injection vectors
before skills are loaded into Claude Code.

Usage:
- ms security scan: Scan all skills for issues
- ms security scan <skill>: Scan specific skill
- ms security quarantine list: Show quarantined content
- ms security quarantine review <id>: Review flagged item

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
